CustomObject.description: Geographic field inspection priority profiles derived from Analysis 3 of the 26-state PermitTEC geographic risk map. Composite score = state litigation risk multiplier × monitoring permit intensity × challenger win rate. Read by NEPA_Permit_Issued_Schedule_Creator and rendered in nepaFieldInspectionCard LWC at mobile form open. One record per state.
CustomObject.label: NEPA State Risk Profile

fields.description: Two-character USPS state abbreviation (e.g., "UT"). Matched against IndividualApplication.nepa_state_code__c to look up the profile.
fields.label: State Code

fields.description: Tier classification: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, VERY_HIGH. Drives the risk badge color in nepaFieldInspectionCard LWC.
fields.label: Litigation Risk Tier

fields.description: Percentage of PermitTEC cases in this state where the challenger prevailed (0–100). Displayed in the field inspector warning panel.
fields.label: Challenger Win Rate (%)

fields.description: State litigation risk multiplier used in composite priority score calculation. Higher = more litigious state relative to baseline.
fields.label: Risk Multiplier

fields.description: Composite priority score (multiplier × monitoring intensity × win rate / baseline). Used to sort and tier states for field deployment prioritization.
fields.label: Composite Priority Score

fields.description: Federal circuit court with jurisdiction over this state. Informs litigation risk context displayed in the inspector briefing.
fields.label: Primary Circuit

fields.description: Semicolon-delimited list of top plaintiff organizations that have filed NEPA challenges in this state (from PermitTEC corpus). Displayed in the inspector briefing panel.
fields.label: Dominant Plaintiffs

fields.description: Semicolon-delimited primary challenge types in this state (e.g., "BLM Travel Management Plans; RMP route designations"). Displayed in the inspector briefing.
fields.label: Dominant Challenge Types

fields.description: Pre-composed warning text surfaced in the F-05 mobile OmniScript at inspection form open. Includes win rate, dominant plaintiffs, and primary challenge types. Rendered by nepaFieldInspectionCard LWC as a risk briefing panel at the top of every Visit record.
fields.label: Field Inspector Warning

fields.description: Inactive profiles are excluded from risk context rendering. SubscriberControlled so agencies can suppress states outside their program area.
fields.label: Active
